title: Transcend
content:
Transcend


“best use for candles” Google search
keyword phrase top organic matches:
https://spokenflames.com
https://litupcandleco.com
these sites are killing it with their SEO

Content Ideas:

  • Meditation: Feature a different candle in each meditation session, light the candle, hold a 10 - 20 min IG live session (featuring different floral and plant arrangements) while meditating and create an ambient vibe, then have a 10 minute session where you give away a candle, a discount code, referral codes, etc.
  • Auction: auction off your products (gift old products as part of the win) on a weekly live auction
  • Behind-the-Scenes: record sessions where the products are made, discuss the trials and tribulations of being a business owner, do Q&As
  • Content for IG posts: write short essays about personal growth, leaning into your aspirational and spiritual sides of your persona. Ask followers to share their own stories and struggle, this will increase engagement, and you will chose one person a week to receive a free product ( the winner will be based on the most liked post ).
